title: Opinion: Opinion | Not Just Jets, China Is Developing A '5-Piece' Carrier Set, And India Should Worry
summary_full: China is now the only state serially producing two distinct stealth fighter families simultaneously, with some estimates projecting that advanced-fighter output across all jet programmes could reach 300-400 aircraft annually by 2027.
